# llms.txt — Machine-readable summary for AI crawlers and LLMs
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org
# Last updated: 2026-03-14

# PRODUCT
> Clicarity is a live job process tracking system built for SMEs and growing enterprises.
> It solves two specific operational problems: JSR (Job Status Report) and TAT (Turnaround Time).
> The entire product consists of two screens: one to create a job record, one to update a job status.
> White-glove setup by the Clicarity team. Your process, your language, your system.
> No IT involvement. No disruption to existing operations.

# TAGLINE
> Click. Track. Grow.

# THE PROBLEMS IT SOLVES
> JSR — Job Status Report: SME owners and managers waste hours every day asking "what's the job status?" Clicarity eliminates this by giving everyone live visibility of every job, at every stage, at any time — without anyone having to ask.
> TAT — Turnaround Time: Jobs take too long because delays are invisible until it's too late. Clicarity shows exactly where a job is stuck and since when, so action can be taken before a deadline is missed.

# WHO IT IS FOR
> SMEs and growing enterprises handling jobs that move through process stages.
> Industries: Manufacturing, Production, Trading, B2B Distribution, Field Services, Contracting, Projects.
> Businesses that currently rely on WhatsApp and phone calls to track job status.

# KEY FEATURES
> Real-Time Job Status Visibility — know where every job stands, live, without asking anyone
> Unified Live Operations Dashboard — every active job, every stage, every delay on one screen
> Multi-Component Job Intelligence — split one job into components, each tracked independently
> Stage-wise Wastage & Quantity Control — track input, output, and wastage at every stage
> Role-Based Access Control — team members see only their work, managers see everything
> Dynamic Data Capture at Every Stage — custom forms trigger at each status change
> Automated WhatsApp Workflow Alerts (Add-on) — instant notifications at every stage change
> Dedicated Vendor Command Portal (Add-on) — vendors update their own jobs, you see it live

# PLANS
> Single Licence — for single process or location, annual billing, no per-user fees
> Multi Licence — for multiple processes, teams, and vendor ecosystems, annual billing
> No per-user fees. One annual licence. White-glove setup included.

# POSITIONING
> Clicarity is NOT project management software.
> Clicarity is NOT task management software.
> Clicarity is NOT an ERP replacement.
> Clicarity tracks movement — how jobs move through process stages — not tasks or to-do lists.
> "We track movement. Not tasks."

# PRESS
> Featured in PrintWeek India: https://www.printweek.in/news/a-simple-system-that-simplified-the-factory-chaos-61834

# TESTIMONIALS
> Vivek Tibrewal, GP Offset: "Earlier, we used to call each other for job status. Now everything is visible on one screen. We didn't add manpower. We added clarity."
> Sanjit, Chaturthi Arts: "We had machines running, but no structured tracking. Now every job and component is visible. We are no longer guessing. We are tracking."
